_note: CampusRide v4.2 queries: A-J (10 categories). v4.2 expansion vs v4.0: (a) Added 3 queries to E covering Facebook/Yik Yak campus identity literature (aligning with E-category manual inclusions); (b) Added 3 queries to I covering closed-community super-apps (KakaoTalk/LINE/workplace modular platforms); (c) Added 4 queries to H for two-sided rating asymmetry + BlaBlaCar amateur driver + small-sample methodology (H-subgroup support); (d) Added 10 cross-category bridge queries to create CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP edge density (E×H, G×F, C×F, D×C, J×H, etc.); (e) arxiv_queries added Yik Yak/Facebook/BlaBlaCar/KakaoTalk/two-sided rating coverage. Temporal window left at OpenAlex/S2 defaults (no lower bound) so E-category 2007-2014 era papers can surface. Target: corpus growth +40% to +60% vs v4.1 baseline.
